programs.title: Destruction Decoded: Season 2
programs.desc: The creators of the program present shocking recordings that show man's clash with the power of the elements.The authors are looking for an answer to the question whether science will allow us to better prepare for disasters.

programs.title: Air Crash Investigation
programs.desc: Behind the scenes of the accident of KLM Cityhopper 433, which was on a routine flight from Amsterdam to Cardiff, Wales.Eleven minutes after takeoff, the crew reported an engine problem.Due to a faulty warning light, she assumed that the oil pressure was too low.The decision was made to return to the airport.Just before touchdown, the plane suddenly tilted to the right.The wing hit the ground.The plane crashed near the runway.Three people died, including the captain.Of the 21 survivors, 9 suffered serious injuries.An investigation by experts revealed an electrical fault.

programs.title: Air Crash Investigation
programs.desc: While landing in Düsseldorf, the turboprop flying Nürnberger Flugdienst 108 crashes. Everyone on board is killed.As part of the investigation, elements of the wreck from the disaster area should be secured.The experts face a real challenge - they must reconstruct the entire machine to determine the causes of the tragedy.The discovery of evidence of a lightning strike is a breakthrough in the case.It turns out that the discharge damaged the electrical system, which resulted in a loss of power.

programs.title: Forbidden History 2
programs.desc:
People in power do not like it when new evidence appears that challenges established truths and concepts that were previously considered indisputable facts.Some stories from the past were specifically suppressed or suppressed, and anyone who tried to reveal them was detained or condemned - or both.Now the host of the program, Jamie Theakston, will get to the heart of matters that are taken for granted today.It will subject them to thorough research, investigation and analysis.In the next installment of the series, he will take a closer look at the lost treasure of Petra, the real Holy Grail, and the mystery of the Nazi UFO.Each of the six episodes is a different story, a different myth or mystery that has been hidden in the darkness of history for centuries
Jamie Theakston verifies the theory that at the end of World War II, the Nazis built a UFO-like aircraft in a secret facility in northern Germany.In the Third Reich, advanced research was actually carried out on rocket technology and wheel-wing aircraft.Experts believe that among the several hundred unidentified flying objects observed during World War II, there were many German prototypes of aircraft and missiles.Their construction claimed the lives of thousands of forced workers.Searching for traces of German UFOs, the program team visits, among others,Owl Mountains in Poland.

programs.title: Forbidden History 2
programs.desc:
People in power do not like it when new evidence appears that challenges established truths and concepts that were previously considered indisputable facts.Some stories from the past were specifically suppressed or suppressed, and anyone who tried to reveal them was detained or condemned - or both.Now the host of the program, Jamie Theakston, will get to the heart of matters that are taken for granted today.It will subject them to thorough research, investigation and analysis.In the next installment of the series, he will take a closer look at the lost treasure of Petra, the real Holy Grail, and the mystery of the Nazi UFO.Each of the six episodes is a different story, a different myth or mystery that has been hidden in the darkness of history for centuries
In this episode, we will learn about the life, work and worldview of the mysterious engineer and inventor of Serbian origin, Nikola Tesla.This extraordinary scientist was the creator of radio and a pioneer of electricity.His most famous inventions include: an electric motor, an alternating current generator, a bicycle dynamo, an autotransformer and a solar battery.The authors of the program show how it happened that, despite his achievements, a brilliant engineer died in poverty and was under FBI investigation.They ask whether Tesla's free energy concept did not cause the government and big business to block his work.Documentarians travel in the inventor's footsteps throughout the United States and Great Britain.
